violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer, bandsaw, and knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took out of service to be washed/sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front retail area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025

The cutting board in the meat cutting area is very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the meat display unit have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2025
Inspector observed heavy accumulation of trash, boxes, and furniture around refuse area. Area to be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front retail area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025
The dumpster was observed in poor repair (missing lid). Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025

Inspector observed cheese in Ziplock bags in the retail open case cooler from an unapproved source. Per interview with PIC, cheese is received that way and could not produce invoices for cheese. PIC discard cheese product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025

Fried pork skins packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

The door to the outside, located in the retail area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the meat cutting area. PIC wrapped items during inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

The cutting boards in the meat cutting area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the deep freezer chest have an accumulation of ice buildup, dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025
The door to the back storage room toilet room is not self-closing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025
The dumpster was observed in poor repair (missing lid). Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025
Old furniture and other items were observed behind the dumpster area. Refuse areas must be maintained clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the walk-in cooler and meat cutting areas. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

The walls in the mop sink area are constructed of drywall. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer, meat saw, walk-in cooler grinder) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

Cut watermelon was observed held at 44 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC placed in walk-in cooler. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

Fried pork skin, packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

The doors to the outside, located in the back storage and front retail areas, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025

The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by droppings on the retail shelves and back storage area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the meat cutting area. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

The cutting boards in the meat cutting area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice chest have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, ice buildup, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025
The door to the back storage area toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025
The receptacle in the toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025
Old furniture and other items were observed behind the dumpster. Refuse areas must be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025
The dumpster was observed in poor repair (missing lid). Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back of the building (outside) against the building. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

The walls in the mop sink area are constructed of drywall. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, mop areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025
